mapper.select: SELECT id, campus, room_name AS roomName, capacity, mapping_aliases AS mappingAliases, capacity_bind_room_id AS capacityBindRoomId FROM room_config WHERE is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_config (campus, room_name, capacity, mapping_aliases, capacity_bind_room_id, is_active) VALUES (#{campus}, #{roomName}, #{capacity}, #{mappingAliases}, #{capacityBindRoomId}, 1)
